name: statecraft-online
description: Foundation shell for a web-based multiplayer nation simulation game.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @statecraft/shared && npm run build --workspace @statecraft/api && npm run build --workspace @statecraft/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @statecraft/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @statecraft/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @statecraft/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @statecraft/shared && npm run test --workspace @statecraft/api && npm run test --workspace @statecraft/web
